history.en: This is a confident cat who loves people and will follow them around, waiting for any opportunity to sit in a lap or give a kiss. He enjoys being handled, making it easy to take him to the veterinarian or train him for therapy work. The Cornish Rex stay in kitten mode most of their lives and well into their senior years.
history.zh: 这是一种自信的猫咪，热爱人类，会跟随他们，等待任何机会坐在膝盖上或给一个吻。它们喜欢被抚摸，这使得带它们去看兽医或训练它们进行治疗工作变得容易。康沃尔雷克斯猫一生大部分时间都保持小猫模式，直到老年。

overview.en: The Cornish Rex is a uniquely affectionate and intelligent cat breed known for its wavy, short coat and elegant, slender build. Originating from the United Kingdom, these cats are highly social, curious, and playful, often retaining a kitten-like energy well into their senior years. They are confident and people-oriented, frequently following their owners around the house, seeking laps, and giving gentle kisses. Their friendly and adaptable nature makes them excellent companions for families, singles, and seniors alike. Despite their active demeanor, they are also content to snuggle, making them perfect lap cats. Their short, fine coat requires minimal grooming but benefits from regular gentle care. Overall, the Cornish Rex is a loving, energetic, and intelligent breed that thrives on human interaction and mental stimulation.
overview.zh: 康沃尔雷克斯猫是一种独特、深情且聪明的猫品种，以其波浪状短毛和优雅纤细的体型著称。原产于英国，这些猫非常社交、好奇且爱玩，常将小猫般的活力保持到老年。它们自信且亲近人，经常跟随主人满屋走动，寻找机会坐在腿上或给予温柔的亲吻。其友好、适应性强的性格使其成为家庭、单身人士和老年人的绝佳伴侣。尽管活跃，它们也乐于依偎，是完美的膝上猫。短而细腻的毛发只需最低限度的梳理，但定期的轻柔护理有益。总体而言，康沃尔雷克斯猫是一种充满爱心、精力充沛且聪明的品种，极度依赖人类的互动和精神刺激。

care.en: Daily care for a Cornish Rex is straightforward but requires attention to their high energy and social needs. Grooming is minimal due to their short, fine coat; a weekly wipe with a soft, damp cloth or gentle brush removes loose hair and distributes natural oils. Bathing every few weeks is recommended to manage oiliness, as their single coat lacks protection. Exercise is vital—they love interactive play with wand toys, fetch, and puzzle feeders. Aim for at least two 15-minute play sessions daily. Regular veterinary check-ups (once or twice yearly) are essential to monitor for common issues like skin conditions or dental problems. Nail trimming every two weeks and ear cleaning as needed complete the routine. Their intelligence demands mental stimulation, so rotate toys and provide climbing structures or cat trees.
care.zh: 康沃尔雷克斯猫的日常护理简单，但需关注其高能量和社交需求。由于毛发短而细腻，梳理要求极低；每周用柔软的湿布或温和刷子擦拭即可去除浮毛并分布天然油脂。建议每几周洗澡一次以控制油性，因为它们缺少外层保护毛。运动至关重要——它们喜欢互动游戏，如逗猫棒、捡球和益智喂食器。每天至少安排两次15分钟的活跃游戏。定期兽医检查（每年一至两次）对监测皮肤问题或牙齿疾病等常见问题至关重要。每两周修剪指甲，按需清洁耳朵，完成日常护理。其智力需要精神刺激，因此要轮换玩具并提供攀爬架或猫树。

training.en: Training a Cornish Rex is a rewarding experience due to their high intelligence, curiosity, and eagerness to please. They respond exceptionally well to positive reinforcement methods, such as clicker training, treats, and praise. Start with basic commands like 'sit,' 'come,' and 'high five,' using short, frequent sessions (5–10 minutes) to maintain their attention. These cats are natural problem-solvers and enjoy learning tricks, such as fetching or walking on a leash. Consistency and patience are key; avoid punishment as it can damage their trusting nature. Because they are people-oriented, they can be trained for therapy work or simple household routines. Socialization from kittenhood is important to ensure they remain confident around strangers, children, and other pets. Their playful curiosity makes training a fun bonding activity.
training.zh: 训练康沃尔雷克斯猫是一种有益的体验，因为它们智商高、好奇且渴望取悦主人。它们对正面强化方法（如响片训练、零食和表扬）反应极佳。从基本指令如“坐下”、“过来”和“击掌”开始，使用简短频繁的课程（5-10分钟）以保持其注意力。这些猫是天生的解决问题高手，喜欢学习把戏，如捡球或牵绳散步。一致性和耐心是关键；避免惩罚，否则可能损害它们的信任感。由于它们亲近人类，可训练用于治疗工作或简单家务。从小社会化很重要，以确保它们在陌生人、儿童和其他宠物面前保持自信。它们顽皮的好奇心使训练成为一项有趣的互动活动。

diet.en: The Cornish Rex has a fast metabolism and high energy level, requiring a nutrient-dense, high-quality diet to maintain its lean, muscular body. Feed a balanced commercial cat food (wet or dry) that lists meat as the first ingredient, with adequate protein and moderate fat content. Because they have minimal body fat, ensure they receive enough calories to avoid weight loss, but monitor portions to prevent obesity, as some individuals can overeat. Divide daily food into two to three meals for better digestion and energy regulation. Fresh, clean water must always be available. Avoid foods with fillers like corn or wheat, and consider omega-3 supplements (fish oil) for skin and coat health. Treats should be limited to 10% of daily intake. Consult your vet for specific portion sizes, especially for kittens or seniors.
diet.zh: 康沃尔雷克斯猫新陈代谢快、精力旺盛，需要营养密集的高质量饮食来维持其苗条、肌肉发达的身体。喂食均衡的商业猫粮（湿粮或干粮），以肉类为第一成分，蛋白质充足、脂肪含量适中。由于它们体脂少，需确保摄入足够热量以防体重下降，但也要监控分量以防肥胖，因为有些个体可能暴食。将每日食物分成两到三餐，以利消化和能量调节。始终提供新鲜干净的水。避免含玉米或小麦等填充物的食物，并考虑补充欧米伽-3（鱼油）以维护皮肤和毛发健康。零食应限制在每日摄入量的10%以内。咨询兽医以确定具体分量，尤其是幼猫或老年猫。

livingTips.en: The Cornish Rex is highly adaptable and thrives in various home environments, including apartments, as long as they receive ample attention and play. Their active, curious nature requires vertical space like cat trees, shelves, or window perches to explore and climb. They are not suited for outdoor unsupervised roaming due to their thin coat and trusting personality; a secure, cat-proofed balcony or harness training for walks is ideal. This breed is excellent with children, especially older ones who respect their boundaries, and generally gets along well with other cats and dog-friendly canines. They can suffer from separation anxiety if left alone for long hours, so consider a companion pet or interactive toys. Their warmth-seeking behavior means they love cozy beds, sunny spots, and blankets. Provide scratching posts and hideaways to satisfy their instincts.
livingTips.zh: 康沃尔雷克斯猫适应性强，能在各种家庭环境中茁壮成长，包括公寓，只要获得足够的关注和游戏。它们活跃好奇的天性需要垂直空间，如猫树、搁板或窗台供其探索和攀爬。由于毛发薄且性格信任，不适合无人看管的户外漫游；安全的猫用阳台或穿戴胸背带散步是理想选择。这个品种非常适合与儿童相处，尤其是尊重它们界限的大龄儿童，并且通常能与其他猫和友善的狗和睦相处。长时间独处可能导致分离焦虑，因此考虑养伴侣宠物或提供互动玩具。它们爱温暖，喜欢舒适的床、阳光点和毯子。提供抓柱和藏身处以满足其本能需求。
